name: brand-landingpage
description: > Brand-first landing page designer — interviews the user to discover brand identity (adjectives, colors, typography, shape language), then generates and iterates on a polished landing page via Stitch with deployment-ready HTML output. Preferred over frontend-design for standalone landing/marketing pages where the user hasn't established visual direction yet.
author: wshobson
summary_zh: 它通过对话帮你梳理品牌调性，自动生成并迭代出可直接部署的精美落地页，专治还没确定视觉风格却要快速搭建独立营销页的痛点。
